# Interactive Environment Check

Used by interactive agents (`interactive_only: true`) to verify they can prompt the user.
Agents and stubs reference this template instead of duplicating the check inline.

**Variable:** `{command_name}` — the slash command name (e.g., `init`, `review`, `replan`)

---

## For Agent Definitions (.claude/agents/)

Place this check **before** the `<role>` section. Read `concert.jsonc` → `interactive_mode`:

- `"interactive_cli"` (default): require EITHER Claude Code CLI OR CoPilot CLI (the "ask user" / AskUserQuestion tool is available)
- `"claude_code_only"`: require Claude Code CLI only
- `"any"`: proceed in any environment

If the required capability is not available:

```
STOP IMMEDIATELY and output:
❌ This command requires an interactive CLI (Claude Code or CoPilot CLI).
Run `/concert:{command_name}` in an interactive CLI instead.
```

Do NOT attempt to proceed without user input. Do NOT guess at answers.

---

## For GitHub Agent Stubs (.github/agents/)

Place this check **after** the managed header, **before** the agent redirect:

```
## Environment Check (MUST RUN FIRST)

Check if you can interactively prompt the user for input.
If you CANNOT ask the user questions (e.g., GitHub Agents UI):

STOP IMMEDIATELY and output:
❌ This command requires interactive mode (Claude Code CLI, CoPilot CLI, or web).
Run `/concert:{command_name}` in an interactive CLI instead.

Do NOT attempt to proceed without user input. Do NOT guess at answers.

## If Interactive

Read .claude/agents/{agent_file} for your complete instructions.
```
